name: Nemain
description: Nemain, whose name translates to "frenzy" or "panic", is a war goddess in Irish mythology. She is closely associated with the Morrígan and Badb, often considered part of a trio of war goddesses. Nemain is believed to incite chaos and terror on the battlefield, disorienting and frightening the enemy. Her presence could turn the tide of battle, as warriors would be overcome with fear and confusion. While her precise role and attributes are sometimes blurred with those of the other war goddesses, Nemain is distinctly associated with the psychological aspects of warfare, inspiring panic and causing mental disarray among opposing forces. She is less focused on the physical aspects of combat and more on the mental and emotional impact of war. Some sources suggest she could shapeshift, adding to her mystique and fear-inducing presence. Nemain's influence extends beyond the battlefield, symbolizing the raw, untamed, and often destructive power of fear and the psychological manipulations that can determine victory or defeat. She embodies the terrifying aspects of conflict and the disorienting effects of panic on the human psyche. She is a primal force, representing the chaotic and unpredictable nature of war, reminding mortals of the fragility of their minds and the ease with which fear can be weaponized. Her power lies in the intangible, the unseen force that can break even the strongest warrior.
subtitle: Goddess of Frenzy and Panic in War

keyMyths.title: The Cattle Raid of Cooley
keyMyths.description: Nemain is mentioned as contributing to the general fear and confusion during the Táin Bó Cúailnge (Cattle Raid of Cooley). Her presence amplified the terror experienced by the opposing army.

keyMyths.title: Nemain's Scream
keyMyths.description: Some accounts describe Nemain as having a scream so terrifying that it could cause hundreds of warriors to die of fright. This showcases her power to induce panic and death through fear alone.

keyMyths.title: Association with the Morrígan
keyMyths.description: Often associated with the Morrígan, Nemain works alongside her to influence the outcome of battles. Their combined presence creates an atmosphere of dread and impending doom for their enemies.
